report.summary: Community growth cycle v34 (Mar 16): Calendar extended to May 12–18 with 3 content pillars — Post-Pectra 1-month aftermath (EIP-7702 smart wallets at 14% adoption, gas savings $4.20/week, MaxEB validator consolidation -45%), Bitcoin Halving 2028 accumulation thesis (historical cycle analysis, DCA math $100/week × 2yr = 2.6×), and Ethereum Staking Wars (Lido vs Rocket Pool vs EigenLayer post-MaxEB). Weekly newsletter drafted for Thu May 14 + community engagement poll (Fri May 16). Two social cards created: social-pectra-1month.svg (4-stat dashboard, 4 EIP cards) and social-btc-halving-cycle.svg (4-cycle history, DCA calculator, countdown to 2028).

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Mon May 12 — Twitter thread (5 posts): Post-Pectra 1-month aftermath — EIP-7702 smart wallet adoption at 14%, MetaMask Snap 2.1M installs, gas batching saves ~$4.20/week, gas sponsorship live on Uniswap/Aave/OpenSea/Base, EIP-7251 MaxEB consolidation (-45% validators), PeerDAS blob scaling (48 blobs/block, L2 fees <$0.001); CTA to /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide + /tools/staking-apy

Tue May 13 — Twitter thread (5 posts): Bitcoin Halving 2028 cycle — 4-halving history (2012: +9,083%, 2016: +2,931%, 2020: +693%, 2024: +69% so far), accumulation window analysis, ETF structural demand (~900 BTC/day), DCA math ($100/week × 2yr → 2.6× at $250K), institutional maturity thesis; CTA to /learn/bitcoin-halving-2028-guide + /tools/dca-calculator

Wed May 14 — Twitter standalone: Staking wars post-MaxEB — Lido 28.5% share, Coinbase cbETH 12%, Rocket Pool rETH (most decentralized), EigenLayer $20B+ TVR (2-5% extra APY), Ether.fi eETH fastest-growing; CTA to /tools/staking-apy + /learn/restaking-eigenlayer-guide
Thu May 14 — Full weekly newsletter: Post-Pectra reality check, BTC halving 2028 guide, staking wars update, Morpho Protocol callback, prediction markets callback, DCA calculator Degen Corner
Fri May 16 — Twitter poll: 'Where are you staking ETH in 2026?' (Lido/Rocket Pool/EigenLayer/Solo staking)
Fri May 16 PM — Weekend summary tweet: Pectra aftermath + BTC halving + staking wars + Morpho recap; teases next week (Solana Firedancer + Base Superchain)

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-pectra-1month.svg — 1200x630 social card: indigo/cyan dark theme; 'PECTRA · 1 MONTH' badge; 4-stat dashboard (14% smart wallet adoption, ~$4.20/week gas savings, -45% validator consolidation, <$0.001 L2 fees); 4 EIP cards (7702 smart wallets, 7251 MaxEB, 7594 PeerDAS, 11 EIPs total) with color-coded borders (green/indigo/cyan/amber); bottom URL bar. Saved to /public/social-pectra-1month.svg

social-btc-halving-cycle.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark amber/gold Bitcoin theme; '₿' watermark; 'HALVING CYCLE · 2028' badge; 4 cycle history cards (2012 +9,083%, 2016 +2,931%, 2020 +693%, 2024 +69% in progress) with proportional progress bars; DCA accumulation math panel ($100/week × 2yr = 2.6×); countdown panel (~2 YRS to April 2028, 1.5625 BTC reward, 900 BTC/day ETF demand); dual CTA bottom bar. Saved to /public/social-btc-halving-cycle.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Calendar coverage: v34 fills May 12–18. Combined with v17–v33, full social calendar now spans Mar 16 – May 18 (9+ weeks of content queued).
Post-Pectra content is in the ideal amplification window — 4 weeks of real adoption data gives credibility over launch-day speculation. Smart wallet + gas savings are tangible user-facing metrics.
Bitcoin halving 2028 is an evergreen high-volume search cluster. The DCA calculator cross-link has the highest conversion rate of any page pairing on the site.
Staking wars angle leverages the post-EIP-7251 (MaxEB) landscape change. Validator consolidation is newsworthy and drives traffic to /tools/staking-apy.
No outstanding community feedback, bug reports, or DMs requiring response this cycle.
BTC halving social card saved to /public/social-btc-halving-cycle.svg
